name: Build a User Profile Card with States
prompt:
Build a user profile card component in HTML and CSS. Save as `profile-card.html`.

Requirements:
- Card contains: avatar (circular placeholder with user initials), user name, role/title, short bio, 3 social media icon links, and a 'Follow' button
- Uses CSS custom properties for all colors and spacing
- Card has subtle shadow, rounded corners, and hover lift effect (translateY + shadow transition)
- The Follow button has 3 states: default (outline), hover (filled), followed (different color + checkmark icon)
- Responsive: on mobile fills container width, on desktop max 400px centered
- BEM naming convention for CSS classes
- No JavaScript frameworks — pure HTML/CSS
- Avatar should be a circular <div> with user initials styled inside

criteria.description: Card has avatar, name, role, bio, social links, follow button.
Circular avatar with user initials displayed.
Follow button has 3 states: default outline, hover filled, followed checkmark.
Card hover lift with translateY and shadow.
Fills container mobile, max 400px desktop centered.
CSS custom properties for colors and spacing.

eval.rubric:
Criterion 1: Visual Polish (Weight: 40%)
1.0: Clean card design, good spacing, clear text hierarchy, shadow depth appropriate.
0.5: Functional but rough.
0: Unstyled.

Criterion 2: Interactive States (Weight: 35%)
1.0: All 3 button states distinct and smooth, hover lift noticeable but subtle.
0.5: 2 of 3 states implemented.
0: No interactive states.

Criterion 3: Code Organization (Weight: 25%)
1.0: BEM consistent, CSS custom properties for all values, commented sections.
0.5: Some organization but inconsistent.
0: Disorganized.
eval.name: Quality Judge
